action.hypothesis: `lowrank_gated_residual` at `K=40`, `EF=8` also regressed badly in proxy, so the current question is no longer whether the leading family survives small capacity but whether any other architecture does better at the same lower-K, same-EF target. The next cleanest move is to hold `K=40`, `EF=8`, optimizer, LR, and aux fixed and switch only the architecture to `two_stage_residual`, which has prior nontrivial full-signal evidence and is the strongest remaining fair challenger in this small-EF comparison band.
action.summary: Run a proxy architecture comparison with `ARCHITECTURE=two_stage_residual`, `K=40`, and `EXPANSION_FACTOR=8`, keeping `signum`, `LR=1.6e-3`, and `AUXK_ALPHA=0.0` fixed. This preserves single-variable isolation, respects the `EF<=16` cap and `EF=8` default, continues the lower-K priority at `K=40`, and tests whether hierarchical residual allocation is a better small-capacity architecture than both `lowrank_residual` and `lowrank_gated_residual` at the same budget.
action.self_review: This is the cleanest next comparison after both small-EF low-rank families underperformed at `K=40`. It keeps the search on the prioritized lower-K track, avoids banned `EF=32` continuation, and changes only architecture.
notes_to_memory: Round 49 showed `lowrank_gated_residual` at `K=40`, `EF=8` is also weak in proxy (`val_fvu=0.17895471677184105`), so the small-EF rebuild of the frontier should not stay family-local.

Both `lowrank_residual` and `lowrank_gated_residual` now look uncompetitive at `K=40`, `EF=8`, which strengthens the case for a same-K, same-EF comparison against `two_stage_residual` rather than any EF increase.
Keep `K=40` as the current lower-K anchor while rebuilding fair `EF=8` architecture comparisons; do not resume `EF=32` runs.
next_hypotheses: If `two_stage_residual` at `K=40`, `EF=8` is competitive in proxy, promote it to full as the first fair small-EF lower-K challenger with nontrivial signal.
If `two_stage_residual` at `K=40`, `EF=8` is also weak, end this small-EF comparison cluster and pivot to a different mechanism family at the same `K=40`, `EF=8` target rather than increasing EF.
If `two_stage_residual` shows better quality but poor runtime behavior, follow with a narrow performance-oriented code fix instead of discarding the family on proxy quality alone.
